Infrared Wellness Products

Panels, beds, and saunas for deep heat therapy and detoxification

Infrared Therapy Solutions

Our infrared wellness products use far-infrared technology to deliver deep penetrating heat that promotes detoxification, pain relief, and relaxation.

  • Deep tissue penetration
  • Detoxification support
  • Pain relief & recovery
  • Improved circulation

Infrared Panels

Slim, wall-mounted panels that deliver targeted infrared heat therapy for any room.
